# routes/verify


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## Verify Handler

Verifies the selection by: 1. Identifying video files that need audio
extraction 2. Extracting audio from each video via the FFmpeg plugin
(stream copy — nearly instant) 3. Building `committed_audio_paths`
(audio files keep their original path, video files use extracted audio
path) 4. Setting `verified = True`

Already-extracted videos (from a previous verify) are not re-extracted.

## Router Initialization

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### init_verify_router

``` python

def init_verify_router(
    state_store:SQLiteWorkflowStateStore, # Workflow state store
    workflow_id:str, # Workflow identifier
    urls:SourceSelectUrls, # Mutable URL bundle
    service:SourceSelectService, # Source select service
    prefix:str='/verify', # Route prefix
)->Tuple: # (router, route_dict)

```

*Initialize verify route for selection verification and audio
extraction.*
